title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at TechSaksham - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at TechSaksham - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
TechSaksham invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About TechSaksham:
TechSaksham is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TechSaksham!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
